ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size of the garment */,
  "s_xl" TEXT /* Size in the S-XL format */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size of the garment */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in inches */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the size conversion */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is listed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand originates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size of the product */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size of the product */,
  "s_xl" TEXT /* Size in the S-XL format */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement of the product */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in inches */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement range in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, sales representative, admin) */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_size_us" TEXT /* Preferred US size */,
  "preferred_size_uk" TEXT /* Preferred UK size */,
  "preferred_size_s_xl" TEXT /* Preferred S-XL size */,
  "preferred_materials" TEXT /* Preferred materials */,
  "preferred_colors" TEXT /* Preferred colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total amount */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., shipped, out for delivery) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the carrier */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the carrier (e.g., UPS, Royal Mail) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_tracking_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
